query: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM commission_payouts) as total_payouts, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM deals) as total_deals, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT dealId) FROM commission_payouts) as deals_with_payouts;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4ELZY9nPkashd2p.root --database gAuoMoig6vkmXbQaeq6Bo3 --execute SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM commission_payouts) as total_payouts, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM deals) as total_deals, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT dealId) FROM commission_payouts) as deals_with_payouts;
